properties.remark: ZAPATA COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGER REPORTED QUARTER SIZE HAIL 1 MILE NORTH OF THE CITY OF LAS PALMAS AND 4 MILES NORTH OF THE CITY OF ZAPATA IN ZAPATA COUNTY. OCCASIONAL HAILSTONES LARGER THAN QUARTER SIZE.
ZAPATA COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTED MINOR FLOODING ALONG EXPRESSWAY 83 BETWEEN THE COMMUNITIES OF LA PERLA AND CORRALITOS. ALSO MINOR FLOODING ALONG 83 2 MILES SOUTH OF THE CITY OF ZAPATA.

SHIP CAPTAIN MURPHY REPORTED THAT FIVE SMALL BOATS WERE SUNK PIERSIDE AT SOUTH PADRE ISLAND THIS MORNING AS A STRONG THUNDERSTORM MOVED THROUGH. A PEAK GUST OF 47 MPH WAS OBSERVED AT KBRO AT 0535 CDT BEFORE ASOS POWER HIT. A PEAK WIND OF 44 MPH WAS REPORTED AT KPIL AT 0538 CDT.
